sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17364" key="au)qekasto/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐθ-εκαστότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17364.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bluntness,</tr_> condemned by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">330</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
